headline: Analysts Bullish on KKR & Co. (KKR) Amid $4.75 Billion CoolIT Systems Sale
summary: KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) earns a spot on our list of the 10 stocks insiders are buying now. As of March 27, 2026, KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) enjoys the confidence of approximately 90% of covering analysts, who maintain bullish ratings on the stock. The consensus price target of $135.50 implies 53.11% upside potential […]

headline: Apollo Circles KKR's Atlantic Aviation In $10 Billion Acquisition Move
summary: Apollo is looking to buy a controlling stake in private jet fixed-base operator Atlantic Aviation from KKR & Co., in a transaction valued at close to $10 billion.
